name: Python collision-aware label modifier
description: Reposition explicit Matplotlib labels with optional adjustText and a deterministic dependency-free Matplotlib fallback.

parameters.name: label_data
parameters.description: Optional explicit label anchors; when omitted, consume the compatible base Recipe's copied label-anchor contract.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: Anchor x column; inferred from the base contract when omitted.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Anchor y column; inferred from the base contract when omitted.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Label column; inferred from the base contract when omitted.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Auto uses adjustText when present, otherwise deterministic Matplotlib placement.

parameters.name: fallback_max_steps
parameters.description: Maximum deterministic search rings per label.

parameters.name: fallback_point_padding_factor
parameters.description: Expand each candidate text box before testing overlap with plotted scatter points, leaving print-safe clearance.

parameters.name: fallback_max_point_overlap
parameters.description: Maximum plotted points a deterministic label may cover before falling back to the least-overlap position.

parameters.name: fontsize
parameters.description: Direct-label size in points for publication-scale output.

transformations.method: optional adjustText or deterministic display-coordinate collision search against labels, axes bounds, and plotted points

does_not_support: Label selection or repositioning does not establish significance.

risks: dense labels may still require manual selection
visual_fingerprint.final_size_behavior: inspect final-size label, point and leader-line collisions
visual_fingerprint.review_note: Materialized UMAP + label-repel + borderless composition was freshly rebuilt on an exact 85 x 75 mm canvas without adjustText and opened together with its original-size render on 2026-07-17. A 1.5x point-clearance box moved all three direct labels away from displayed points; labels, leader lines and legend remained readable and unclipped.

notes: The deterministic fallback was executed without adjustText.
method='adjusttext' still fails explicitly when the optional dependency is absent.
The compatible UMAP base exposes a copied median label-anchor contract so runtime composition does not require DataFrame serialization in JSON parameters.
The deterministic engine tests labels against axes bounds, other labels and plotted points, and the runtime rebuilds final-size compositions before modifiers.
Native visual QA passed in the declared UMAP composition; standalone modifier preview is not claimed.
